sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (id UInt32, value Float64, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT quantilesGK(10, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(multiIf(value IS NULL, 0, value) + 1) FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT id, quantilesGK(1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(value) AS quantiles FROM test_quantiles GROUP BY id HAVING quantiles[2] > 1.0;
SELECT id, quantilesGK(100, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(value + 1.0) FROM (SELECT value, id FROM test_quantiles WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01 00:00:00') AS subquery WHERE id < 4;
SELECT quantilesGK(100, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(multiIf(value IS NULL, -1, value * 2) + transform(value, [0.0], [NULL], 1)) FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT id, quantilesGK(1000, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(value) AS quantiles FROM test_quantiles WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 5 GROUP BY id ORDER BY quantiles[1] DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT ON (id) quantilesGK(100, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(CASE WHEN value > 2 THEN value ELSE NULL END) AS quantiles FROM test_quantiles;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE test_temp AS SELECT *, multiIf(value IS NULL, 0, value) AS adjusted_value FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT avg(val) as average, quantilesGK(100, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(val) FROM (SELECT value AS val FROM test_temp WHERE adjusted_value > 0) AS avg_subquery GROUP BY adjusted_value HAVING average > 1.0;
